acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_prose_001] Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:283, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:295, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:313 contains no more than one sentence built on a `not X / only Y` or `not X exactly` correction; fail if multiple sentences in those cited spots still rely on the same negation-qualification rhythm.

[chapter_02_prose_002] Pass if, among the four cited beats, no more than one revised sentence personifies `silence`, `answer`, or `house` as the primary actor and the other beats express tension through concrete human or environmental action visible on the page; fail if the same personified-room construction still appears in multiple cited spots.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:283, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:295, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:313 contains no more than one sentence built on a `not X / only Y` or `not X exactly` correction; fail if multiple sentences in those cited spots still rely on the same negation-qualification rhythm.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly leans on the same negation-correction syntax (`not X so much as Y`, `not X exactly`, `not safety ... only`). By the midnight sequence the cadence has become a tic: instead of letting images land cleanly, the prose keeps qualifying itself in the same way, which softens otherwise strong material and makes several beats sound built from the same template.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the cited beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:283, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:295, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:313, and if needed the opening sentence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:3, so most of these images arrive as direct assertions rather than self-corrections. Keep only the one instance that earns special emphasis.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, among the four cited beats, no more than one revised sentence personifies `silence`, `answer`, or `house` as the primary actor and the other beats express tension through concrete human or environmental action visible on the page; fail if the same personified-room construction still appears in multiple cited spots.
findings.problem: Several tension beats use the same fallback device of letting the room or an abstraction carry the emotion for the characters (`The silence in the room had shape to it`, `The answer sat there`, `The house held still around her`, `The house gave only its normal sounds`). Repeated across both scenes, the device starts to feel like default pressure-setting rather than a fresh observation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least two of the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:85, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:287 so pressure comes from specific bodily or material action instead of an abstract noun or the house itself taking grammatical agency. Keep the strongest single instance and vary the rest.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally compromised caretaking, the bureaucratic brutality of naming, and the physical labor of moving the dead. When an edge case appears, prefer the detail a witness would remember over the phrasing a polite narrator would use. Let tenderness exist inside harsh material without cleaning the harshness off.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If childbirth, exhumation, poverty, sexual history, bodily decay, or violence enters a scene, render it through specific sensation and consequence; summarizing away the hard fact counts as a failed pass, not tasteful restraint.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High overall; contractions are the norm across dialogue, with fuller forms reserved for class performance, legal formality, deliberate emphasis, or a character trying not to lose composure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public labor chapters with quieter domestic or inventory chapters, vary scene count and dialogue density, let some chapters turn on information or paperwork rather than confrontation, and ensure no two consecutive chapters share the same dominant mechanism, pace, or emotional temperature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken historical Appalachian-Southern English without caricature; concrete, unsentimental, regionally grounded, and alert to how legal language clashes with lived speech.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Della Bledsoe, intimate enough to track bodily memory and evasive thought while never slipping into other characters' interior monologue as fact
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular work-sentence compression with longer accumulating sentences that carry memory, atmosphere, and moral weight; let cadence tighten in hearings and exhumations, then widen in domestic or reflective passages.
